description: Agricultural and garden plants found in modern settings.
plants: An exotic flower kept alive under glass, its delicate blooms requiring more attention than most pets.
A uniform carpet of green maintained by sprinklers and mowers, the pride and burden of suburbia.
Thorned canes bearing blooms in every shade from white to near-black, beautiful and ready to draw blood.
A backyard tree heavy with fruit in summer, dropping more than anyone can eat onto the grass below.
A sprawling vine tied to a stake, bearing red fruit warm from the sun.
A green thing in a ceramic pot on a shelf, surviving on irregular watering and indirect light.
A miniature tree shaped by decades of patient pruning, old beyond what its size suggests.
A basket of trailing fronds suspended from a porch ceiling, dripping after every watering.
